issues.description: Condition missing hand size comparison. Card text requires: 'If the number of cards in your hand is at least 3 less than the number in your opponent's hand'. DSL condition is 'Always' but should check hand differential.
Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost specification. The DSL shows 'Activated' correctly but lacks the cost constraint that this is a [Main] activation requiring the character to rest first.
